attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WIRIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
 WIRIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WIRIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WIRIRM.PRODUCT_KEY,
 WIRIRM.AR_TRX_KEY,
 WIRIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 WIRIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 WIRIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 WIRIRM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 WIRIRM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WIRIRM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 WIRIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 WIRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRIRM.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 WIRIRM.DD_GL_DATETIME,
 WIRIRM.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WIRIRM.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 WIRIRM.DV_FISCAL_DT,
 WIRIRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WIRIRM.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
 WIRIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 WIRIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_MISC_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
 WIRIRM.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
 USER  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 WIRIRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.GL_DT,
 WIRIRM.BK_SS_CD,
 WIRIRM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
 WIRIRM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 WIRIRM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 WIRIRM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 WIRIRM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
 WIRIRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 WIRIRM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 WIRIRM.TRANSACTION_DT,
 WIRIRM.GL_POSTED_DTM,
 WIRIRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,
 WIRIRM.SPLIT_PCT,
 WIRIRM.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 WIRIRM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
 WIRIRM.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG ,
 'A' AS DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLAG ,
 'N' AS RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG,
 WIRIRM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
 WIRIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
 WIRIRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 WIRIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WIRIRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 COALESCE (WIRIRM.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
 COALESCE (WIRIRM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,'UNKNOWN') BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD , /*prbobba added for Q1FY15*/
 COALESCE (WIRIRM.DV_FMV_FLG,'N') DV_FMV_FLG , /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF FMV Q1FY15*/
 WIRIRM.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,/* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 WIRIRM.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT, /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 WIRIRM.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT , /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 WIRIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /* PPUSA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
 WIRIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /* PPUSA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
WIRIRM.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,
/*PRMADDAL: Added below 4 columns as part of Q3FY17 RO SCOPE*/
 WIRIRM.XCAT_FLG,
 WIRIRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 WIRIRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
 WIRIRM.ELA_FLG,
 WIRIRM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG AS ACTION_CODE,
 WIRIRM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG AS DML_TYPE,
 WIRIRM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
 WIRIRM.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG /* added aspart of Mar 11th product subscription scope */
 ,WIRIRM.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 ,WIRIRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* Added as part of ICPM Q3FY20*/
 ,WIRIRM.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
 ,WIRIRM.NET_PRICE_FLG
 ,WIRIRM.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
 ,WIRIRM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
 ,WIRIRM.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,WIRIRM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WIRIRM.DV_BNI_FHI_TYPE_CODE /* ADDED AS A PART OF PPMT SCOPE FOR EDW_FY23Finance_APR_Release  */
,WIRIRM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE_INCR WIRIRM  
 WHERE WIRIRM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG  IN ('I', 'U')
 AND WIRIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD='SLS_ADJ'

SELECT
 WIRIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
 WIRIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WIRIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WIRIRM.PRODUCT_KEY,
 WIRIRM.AR_TRX_KEY,
 WIRIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 WIRIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 WIRIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WIRIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 REST_BKG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 WIRIRM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 WIRIRM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 REST_BKG.SALES_REP_NUM AS  SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
 WIRIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 WIRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WIRIRM.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 WIRIRM.DD_GL_DATETIME,
 WIRIRM.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WIRIRM.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 WIRIRM.DV_FISCAL_DT,
 WIRIRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WIRIRM.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
 WIRIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 WIRIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_MISC_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 WIRIRM.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 (WIRIRM.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100)  AS DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
 (WIRIRM.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
 USER  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 WIRIRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
 WIRIRM.GL_DT,
 WIRIRM.BK_SS_CD,
 (WIRIRM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY   * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS  DV_EXTENDED_QTY         ,
 (WIRIRM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
 (WIRIRM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 WIRIRM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 WIRIRM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
 WIRIRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 WIRIRM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 WIRIRM.TRANSACTION_DT,
 WIRIRM.GL_POSTED_DTM,
 WIRIRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT  * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT  * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100) AS DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT  ,
 (WIRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT  * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100) AS DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT    ,
 WIRIRM.SPLIT_PCT * (COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT,100)/100) AS BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT ,
 WIRIRM.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 WIRIRM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
 WIRIRM.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG ,
 'R' AS DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLAG ,
 'N' AS RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG,
 WIRIRM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
 WIRIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
 WIRIRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 WIRIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WIRIRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 COALESCE (WIRIRM.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
 COALESCE (WIRIRM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,'UNKNOWN') BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD , /*prbobba added for Q1FY15*/
 COALESCE (WIRIRM.DV_FMV_FLG,'N') DV_FMV_FLG ,/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF FMV Q1FY15*/
 WIRIRM.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,/* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 (WIRIRM.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT  * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,
 /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 (WIRIRM.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT  * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100) /100)  AS DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,
 WIRIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /* PPUSA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
 WIRIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY ,/* PPUSA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
WIRIRM.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,
/*PRMADDAL: Added below 4 columns as part of Q3FY17 RO SCOPE*/
 WIRIRM.XCAT_FLG,
 WIRIRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 WIRIRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
 WIRIRM.ELA_FLG,
 WIRIRM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG AS ACTION_CODE,
 WIRIRM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG AS DML_TYPE,
 WIRIRM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
 WIRIRM.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG /* added aspart of Mar 11th product subscription scope */
 ,WIRIRM.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 ,WIRIRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* Added as part of ICPM Q3FY20*/
 ,WIRIRM.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
 ,WIRIRM.NET_PRICE_FLG
 ,WIRIRM.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
 ,WIRIRM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
 ,WIRIRM.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,WIRIRM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
 ,WIRIRM.DV_BNI_FHI_TYPE_CODE /* ADDED AS A PART OF PPMT SCOPE FOR EDW_FY23Finance_APR_Release  */
 ,WIRIRM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE_INCR WIRIRM
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT REST_BKG  
 ON REST_BKG.RU_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT=WIRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
 AND REST_BKG.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WIRIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 AND  REST_BKG.LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG = 'Y'  
 AND  REST_BKG.REV_HIST_RESTATED_FLAG = 'Y'
 AND  REST_BKG.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ( 'POS_ADJ' , 'SLS_ADJ' ) 
 WHERE 
 WIRIRM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG  ='R'
 AND WIRIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'SLS_ADJ'

/* QUALIFYING ALL THE HIERARCHY MAPPING TRANSACTIONS IN THIS PIPELINE */

SELECT
  WIRIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
  WIRIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  WIRIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  WIRIRM.PRODUCT_KEY,
  WIRIRM.AR_TRX_KEY,
  WIRIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  WIRIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
  WIRIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WIRIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WIRIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WIRIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NSLTRM.RSTD_SLS_TERR_KEY AS  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  WIRIRM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
  WIRIRM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  'UNKNOWN' AS  SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
  WIRIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  WIRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
  WIRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
  WIRIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  WIRIRM.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
  WIRIRM.DD_GL_DATETIME,
  WIRIRM.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
  WIRIRM.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  WIRIRM.DV_FISCAL_DT,
  WIRIRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  WIRIRM.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
  WIRIRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
  WIRIRM.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
  WIRIRM.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
  WIRIRM.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
  WIRIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
  WIRIRM.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
  WIRIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
  WIRIRM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
  WIRIRM.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
  WIRIRM.DV_MISC_FLG,
  WIRIRM.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
  WIRIRM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
  WIRIRM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
  WIRIRM.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY ,
  WIRIRM.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
  USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
  USER  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  WIRIRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  WIRIRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
  WIRIRM.GL_DT,
  WIRIRM.BK_SS_CD,
  WIRIRM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
  WIRIRM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  ,
  WIRIRM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
  WIRIRM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  WIRIRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  WIRIRM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
  WIRIRM.TRANSACTION_DT,
  WIRIRM.GL_POSTED_DTM,
  WIRIRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,
  WIRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.SPLIT_PCT,
  WIRIRM.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
  WIRIRM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
  WIRIRM.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG ,
  'H' AS DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLAG ,
  'N' AS RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG,
  WIRIRM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
  WIRIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
  WIRIRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  WIRIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
  WIRIRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
  COALESCE (WIRIRM.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
  COALESCE (WIRIRM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,'UNKNOWN') BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD , /*prbobba added for Q1FY15*/
  COALESCE (WIRIRM.DV_FMV_FLG,'N') DV_FMV_FLG ,/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF FMV Q1FY15*/
  WIRIRM.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,/* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
  /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
  WIRIRM.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,
   /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
  WIRIRM.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /* PPUSA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
  WIRIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /* PPUSA : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
 WIRIRM.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_2TIER_CMDM_AMT , /* derived as part of  CE-CHINA Aug 2016 CDR*/
 /*PRMADDAL: Added below 4 columns as part of Q3FY17 RO SCOPE*/
  WIRIRM.XCAT_FLG,
  WIRIRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
  WIRIRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
  WIRIRM.ELA_FLG,
WIRIRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY, /* Column added as part of Q4FY17 CSPP VIP Proj*/
 WIRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT ,
  WIRIRM.POB_TYPE_CD,
  'R' AS ACTION_CODE,
  'R' AS DML_TYPE ,
 WIRIRM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG, /* Added as part of NRS PI-3 */
  WIRIRM.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG ,/* Added as part of NRS PI-3 */
 WIRIRM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD /*Added as part of RO  Sep 10th release*/
 ,WIRIRM.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG,
  /*Added as part of Accruals Q2FY19*/
 WIRIRM.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD,
 WIRIRM.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,
 WIRIRM.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  /*Added as part of Meraki Q2FY19*/
 ,WIRIRM.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 ,WIRIRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* Added as part of ICPM Q3FY20*/
 ,WIRIRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
 ,WIRIRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 ,WIRIRM.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/ 
 ,WIRIRM.NET_PRICE_FLG
 ,WIRIRM.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
 ,WIRIRM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
 ,WIRIRM.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,WIRIRM.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,WIRIRM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WIRIRM.DV_BNI_FHI_TYPE_CODE /* ADDED AS A PART OF PPMT SCOPE FOR EDW_FY23Finance_APR_Release  */
,WIRIRM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE_INCR WIRIRM
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_TERR_RSTMNT_MAPPING NSLTRM
 ON WIRIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=NSLTRM.ORIG_SLS_TERR_KEY
  WHERE 
  WIRIRM.INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG  ='H'
